title: ononis repens var. procurrens
intro: Ononis repens var. procurrens, also known as creeping restharrow, is a perennial plant that belongs to the legume family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to its high content of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of creeping restharrow include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of creeping restharrow can be made by infusing the plant in hot water or extracting its essential oils, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
